title: @hanzheng_7: CORAL multi-agent evolution paper co-author share
rawContent: Tweet by @hanzheng_7 (Han Zheng) — co-author of CORAL paper. Sharing link to CORAL paper (arxiv.org/abs/2604.01658v1). Han Zheng is second author. Tweet content not fully extractable via WebFetch (JS-required). Embedded link followed to arXiv paper. Full paper analysis available via first author tweet (ao_qu18465_2041233318373388459.json).
